summary: Great show hampered by a badly equalized soundboard recording
review: The performance is praised as great, but the recording suffers from poor equalization that leaves the bass recessed and the mix muddy. The source appears to be a stereo soundboard (sbd) with only modest audio clarity.

ai_rating.rationale: Review highlights an excellent musical performance but notes significant EQ problems; the weighted average of show quality (high) and recording quality (low) yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bad equalization, bass recessed, overall mix sounds muddy

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing

band_member_comments.Phil: Bass appears weak/recessed due to poor EQ
